title: Calistenia Exercise Catalog Seed
description: Schema for seeding exercises_catalog and exercise_progressions tables. Each file represents one top-level category and contains subcategories (movement families) with their exercises ordered by progression difficulty.

category.description: Top-level category key stored in exercises_catalog.category

category_label.description: Human-readable category name for UI display

subcategories.description: Movement families within this category (e.g., Push-ups, Dips within Push). Exercises within a subcategory form a natural progression chain.

i18n.description: Translatable field — keys are ISO 639-1 locale codes. 'es' is required (primary language), 'en' recommended.

subcategory.description: A movement family grouping related exercise variations and progressions

base_movement.description: Short description of the base movement pattern

exercises.description: Exercises ordered by progression_order (easiest first). Adjacent exercises form implicit prev/next progression links.

exercise.description: A single exercise entry for exercises_catalog + optional progression data

equipment.description: Required equipment keys → exercises_catalog.equipment (JSON array). Empty array = bodyweight only.

default_reps.description: Recommended reps (can be range like '8-12' or text like 'max') → exercises_catalog.default_reps

default_rest_seconds.description: Rest between sets in seconds → exercises_catalog.default_rest_seconds

default_timer_seconds.description: Hold duration for timer exercises → exercises_catalog.default_timer_seconds

youtube.description: YouTube video ID or URL → exercises_catalog.youtube

note.description: Coaching cues or technique notes → exercises_catalog.note (JSON)

image_files.description: Relative paths to demo images (uploaded to exercises_catalog.default_images). Empty = placeholder for later.

video_file.description: Relative path to demo video (uploaded to exercises_catalog.default_video). Empty = placeholder for later.

progression_order.description: Position in the subcategory's progression chain (1 = easiest). Used to build exercise_progressions records.

target_reps_to_advance.description: Reps needed before advancing to next progression → exercise_progressions.target_reps_to_advance

sessions_at_target.description: Consecutive sessions at target reps before advancing → exercise_progressions.sessions_at_target

equipment_key_reference.description: Equipment key mapping for reference (not used in validation)

bench.const: Banco, silla o superficie elevada / Bench or elevated surface

parallel_bars.const: Paralelas o dos sillas / Parallel bars or two chairs

weighted_vest.const: Mochila con peso o lastre / Weighted vest or backpack

step_box.const: Escalón o caja / Step or box
